TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT bi_timephaseddata_budget.ecosystimephasedbudgetid, bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber, bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectperiod, bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid, bi_timephaseddata_budget.budgetheaderid, bi_timephaseddata_budget.changeheaderid, bi_timephaseddata_budget.costaccountfield, bi_timephaseddata_budget.pathid, bi_timephaseddata_budget.minorperiod, bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobscost, bi_timephaseddata_budget.clientcost, bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobshours, bi_timephaseddata_budget.clienthours, bi_timephaseddata_budget.currency, concat(projectnumber,'~', projectperiod, '~',minorPeriod , '~',EcoSysTimephasedBudgetId ), bi_timephaseddata_budget.gidquantity, bi_timephaseddata_budget..GDCName FROM bi_timephaseddata_budget where workflowinstanceid in ( select distinct workflowinstanceid from BI_TimephasedData_Queue)

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT bi_timephaseddata_budget.ecosystimephasedbudgetid, bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber, bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectperiod, bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid+1000000 as workflowinstanceid, bi_timephaseddata_budget.budgetheaderid, bi_timephaseddata_budget.changeheaderid, bi_timephaseddata_budget.costaccountfield, bi_timephaseddata_budget.pathid, bi_timephaseddata_budget.minorperiod, bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobscost, bi_timephaseddata_budget.clientcost, bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobshours, bi_timephaseddata_budget.clienthours, bi_timephaseddata_budget.currency, concat(bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber,'~', bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectperiod, '~',bi_timephaseddata_budget.minorPeriod , '~',bi_timephaseddata_budget.EcoSysTimephasedBudgetId ), bi_timephaseddata_budget.gidquantity, bi_timephaseddata_budget.GDCName, bi_timephaseddata_budget.GIDCBDirectCost, bi_timephaseddata_budget.GIDCBAtBillRevenue, bi_timephaseddata_budget.GIDBillableHours FROM bi_timephaseddata_budget --where workflowinstanceid in ( 695,702) --select workflowinstanceid --from BI_TimephasedData_Queue where enddate>=convert(datetime,'$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE',121)) inner join (select distinct projectnumber, workflowinstanceid from BI_TimephasedData_Queue where editeddate > convert(datetime,'$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE',121) --'10/13/2020' and workflowinstanceid is not null) new_data on bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber = new_data.projectnumber and bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid = new_data.workflowinstanceid and bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid is not null and bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid > 0

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SDE_IPCS_BItimePhasedDataBudgetFact.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SDE_IPCS_BItimePhasedDataBudgetFact.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SDE_IPCS_BItimePhasedDataBudgetFact.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub
